[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 01000110 3
1 01100000 2
2 01100000 2
3 00000000 a
4 01000100 2
5 00000010 1
6 01000110 3
7 00000010 1

01 00000000 a match 3
12 01000100 2 match 4
23 00100000 1
34 11010100 4
45 00000000 a match 3
56 00001001 2
67 00010110 3
70 00101000 2

02 01000000 1
13 00100000 1
24 10110000 3
35 10010000 2
46 00000001 1
57 00000111 3
60 00110110 4
71 00001000 1

03 00000000 a match 3
14 01100100 3
25 10110000 3
36 10000000 1
47 00000011 2
50 00001111 4
61 00010010 2
72 01001000 2

15 00100000 1
26 10000000 1
37 10010110 4
40 00000011 2
51 00001011 3
62 01000100 2 match 4
73 00101000 2

05 00000000 a match 3
16 00000000 a match 3
27 10010010 3
30 10010110 4
41 00000011 2
52 01001101 4
63 00100000 1
74 01101000 3

32 01000100 2 match 4
43 00000001 1

65 00110000 2
76 00001000 1
